description: Rebuild SpotifyMiniPlayer to be draggable with an expandable draggable player window, available during Pomodoro sessions
steps: 1. Rebuild frontend/components/SpotifyMiniPlayer.tsx. The music button should be draggable to anywhere on the right panel of the screen (use @dnd-kit or manual pointer/mouse event-based drag since we need free-form positioning, not snap-to-grid). The button starts at bottom-right but the user can drag it anywhere within the right portion of the viewport.

2. On clicking the music button, open the Spotify player in a draggable/holdable floating window. This window should be movable to any part of the screen (not just the right panel). Implement drag-to-move using pointer events on the window header. The window should have: a drag handle (header bar), close button, and the Spotify embed iframe. Keep the iframe always mounted so music does not stop.

3. Ensure the SpotifyMiniPlayer is rendered in frontend/app/dashboard/layout.tsx (it already is) and confirm it will be visible even when the FocusMode/Pomodoro overlay is active. The FocusMode component uses z-[100] for its overlay. The SpotifyMiniPlayer should have z-[110] or higher so it stays on top during Pomodoro sessions. Update the z-index of both the floating button and the expanded window.

4. Style the music button and player window to match the warm/minimalistic theme. No pixel styling, no glow. Use var(--surface), var(--border), var(--text-secondary) etc. The button should be a clean circle/rounded-xl with a subtle border. The player window should have rounded-2xl, border, surface background, subtle shadow.
acceptance_criteria: The music button is draggable to any position on the right side of the screen
Clicking the button opens a Spotify player window
The player window is draggable to any position on the entire screen
The player window can be closed back to just the button
Music continues playing when navigating between pages (iframe stays mounted)
The music button and player window are visible and usable during Pomodoro sessions (z-index above FocusMode)
No pixel/glow styling on the button or player
pnpm lint and pnpm build both pass
findings: Removed framer-motion dependency from SpotifyMiniPlayer (not needed for pointer-event based drag). Used pointer events directly instead of @dnd-kit since we need free-form absolute positioning rather than list reordering. The button uses position:fixed with left/top calculated from pointer deltas. Removed hasPlaylist state as it was unused for rendering logic. Removed AnimatePresence - simple conditional rendering is sufficient and avoids complexity with pointer events.
